testcase.name: getClient_FromCache_Success
testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.330 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Retrieving client profile: CLI-ABC12345 for agent: AGENT-100
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\siahj\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.7\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.7.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: updateClient_OnlyUpdatesChangedFields
testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.412 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Updating client profile: CLI-ABC12345 for agent: AGENT-100 23:51:42.412 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Fetching authorized client for clientId=CLI-ABC12345 agentId=AGENT-100 23:51:42.412 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Client profile updated successfully: CLI-ABC12345

testcase.name: findEmailByClientIdAndAgentId_EmailBlank_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.432 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Fetching email for clientId=CLI-ABC12345 agentId=AGENT-100

testcase.name: updateClient_Success_UpdatesAllFields
testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.441 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Updating client profile: CLI-ABC12345 for agent: AGENT-100 23:51:42.442 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Fetching authorized client for clientId=CLI-ABC12345 agentId=AGENT-100 23:51:42.444 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Client profile updated successfully: CLI-ABC12345

testcase.name: getClient_CacheHitButWrongAgent_FetchesFromRepository
testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.455 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Retrieving client profile: CLI-ABC12345 for agent: AGENT-100

testcase.name: existsByClientIdAndAgentId_True
testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.465 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Checking if client exists: CLI-ABC12345 for agent: AGENT-100

testcase.name: updateClient_DeletedClient_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.470 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Updating client profile: CLI-ABC12345 for agent: AGENT-100 23:51:42.470 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Fetching authorized client for clientId=CLI-ABC12345 agentId=AGENT-100

testcase.name: patchClientStatus_Success
testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.474 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Patching status for client profile: CLI-ABC12345 to VERIFIED by agent: AGENT-100 23:51:42.474 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Fetching authorized client for clientId=CLI-ABC12345 agentId=AGENT-100 23:51:42.477 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Client profile status updated successfully: CLI-ABC12345

testcase.name: findEmailByClientIdAndAgentId_EmailMissing_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.485 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Fetching email for clientId=CLI-ABC12345 agentId=AGENT-100

testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.492 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Retrieving all client profiles for agent: AGENT-100

testcase.name: updateClient_EmailAlreadyExists_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.502 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Updating client profile: CLI-ABC12345 for agent: AGENT-100 23:51:42.502 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Fetching authorized client for clientId=CLI-ABC12345 agentId=AGENT-100

testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.514 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Fetching email for clientId=CLI-ABC12345 agentId=AGENT-100

testcase.name: createClient_Success
testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.520 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Creating client profile for agent: AGENT-100

testcase.name: sendVerificationEmail_Success
testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.530 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Sending verification email for client: CLI-ABC12345 by agent: AGENT-100 23:51:42.530 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Fetching authorized client for clientId=CLI-ABC12345 agentId=AGENT-100

testcase.name: deleteClient_Success
testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.535 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Soft deleting client profile: CLI-ABC12345 by agent: AGENT-100 23:51:42.535 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Fetching authorized client for clientId=CLI-ABC12345 agentId=AGENT-100 23:51:42.537 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Client profile soft deleted successfully: CLI-ABC12345

testcase.system-out: 23:51:42.541 [main] INFO com.example.client.ClientProfile.ClientProfileServiceImpl -- Retrieving all client profiles for agent: AGENT-100
